overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt walking through a snowy mountain landscape at dusk. The character traverses narrow rocky passages and open cliff edges with a mysterious vertical beam of light visible in the distant fog, eventually revealing a dark gothic spire before continuing through the terrain.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow rocky mountain passage opening to cliff

events.description: emerging from narrow rocky corridor into open cliffside view with expansive foggy valley
vertical beam of light becomes visible piercing through the fog over the distant water

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the snowy mountain passage with a sword on his back, emerging onto a cliff edge

entered.detail: tall snow-dusted rock wall forming the left side of the passage
steep rocky slope with patches of snow on the right
narrow winding trail covered in snow and ice
mysterious vertical beam of blue-white light piercing through the fog over the water

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a narrow rocky mountain passage with snow-covered ground. As the path opens up around 6 seconds, a vast foggy valley reveals itself with a mysterious vertical beam of light visible in the far distance over the water.

scene_state.functional_zone: open mountain cliffside overlooking foggy valley

events.description: slight left turn to follow the curving cliff path along the ridge

agents.ego_description: walking along the exposed cliff edge with the beam of light visible ahead over the foggy expanse

entered.detail: steep drop-off to the foggy valley below
snow-capped peaks visible across the foggy expanse

segments.scene_description: Walking along an open cliffside path with expansive views of the foggy valley and the mysterious beam of light. The terrain is snow-covered with rocky outcrops, and distant mountain ranges are visible through the mist.

scene_state.functional_zone: snowy mountain ridge with view of gothic spire

events.description: character turns 180 degrees to face the camera, revealing a large dark spire behind him
character turns back around and continues walking along the snowy ridge

agents.ego_description: turning around to look back at the dark spire structure, then continuing along the snowy ridge path

entered.detail: tall gothic spire with dark stone architecture perched on the mountain peak behind the character

segments.scene_description: The character turns around revealing a dramatic dark gothic spire behind him, then continues walking along the snowy ridge. The beam of light shifts to the left side of the frame as the perspective changes, and the spire dominates the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky mountain pass with icicle formations

events.description: entering a more enclosed rocky area with large boulders and hanging icicles

agents.ego_description: walking through a rocky passage with large snow-covered boulders and icicle formations on the right

entered.detail: large rock formations with hanging icicles and ice formations
large snow-dusted boulders lining the left side of the path

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a rocky mountain pass with large boulders and icicle formations. The dark spire and beam of light are no longer visible as the path winds through the enclosed rocky terrain with overhanging icicles.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a snowy mountain landscape that transitions from an open, mysterious vista to a claustrophobic rocky pass. It begins within a narrow rocky passage with snow-covered ground, which gradually opens up to reveal a vast foggy valley and a mysterious vertical beam of light shimmering in the far distance over the water. As the camera follows the character along an open cliffside path, the view expands to show distant mountain ranges through the mist before turning to reveal a dramatic dark gothic spire looming in the background. The perspective then shifts as the character continues along the snowy ridge, with the beam of light moving to the side of the frame. Finally, the scene closes in as the path winds through an enclosed mountain pass filled with large boulders and overhanging icicle formations, obscuring the spire and the light from view.
